channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-25 21:41 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Taxes screw over both the companies and the states they’re in. Taxes didn’t build those big companie...
item.description: Taxes screw over both the companies and the states they’re in. Taxes didn’t build those big companies. They show up after the success. They sure as hell didn’t create Silicon Valley. The sky-high taxes came later, once it was already killing it. California basically turned its successful companies into hosts and started parasitically draining them for more and more cash, jacking up the rates year after year. They forget the first rule of parasitism: don’t kill the host. Companies only have so much tolerance before they say screw it and bail for another state with better deals and resources. And that breaking point is a lot lower these days.

item.title: @elonmusk: It's actually 1% of the population that committed 63% of violent crimes, at least in Sweden.
item.description: It's actually 1% of the population that committed 63% of violent crimes, at least in Sweden.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Restore Britain can save Britain
item.description: Only Restore Britain can save Britain

item.title: @elonmusk: A Restore Britain Government will not bring wealth and joy overnight. We are honest about that. Ther...
item.description: A Restore Britain Government will not bring wealth and joy overnight. We are honest about that. There are no quick fixes to the dire mess we are in. There will be a very large number of very difficult decisions to be taken. It will be hard, but it is entirely necessary.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🇩🇪 A 20-year-old illegal Afghan migrant sexually assaulted an 11-year-old girl and threatened her wi...
item.description: 🇩🇪 A 20-year-old illegal Afghan migrant sexually assaulted an 11-year-old girl and threatened her with a knife at a special needs school in Germany. Nassar S., a 20-year-old unemployed Afghan migrant, has been arrested after brutally assaulting an 11-year-old girl at the Hans-Zulliger-Schule, a special needs school in Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate. Together with a 19-year-old accomplice, he entered the school grounds despite prohibition signs. The girl was attacked in the toilet room, where she was threatened with a knife during the assault. The victim only told her sister about the horrific assault two days later. Although Nassar S. was arrested, his accomplice escaped and is still at large.

item.title: @elonmusk: Watching Grok Build think is pretty fascinating. Definitely noticing a change with the releases made...
item.description: Watching Grok Build think is pretty fascinating. Definitely noticing a change with the releases made this weekend, its become incredibly thoughtful. And the plans are getting insanely detailed, I mean just look at the architecture deep dive it did here.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build is now available in Beta for all SuperGrok and X Premium+ users. Use Plan Mode, create im...
item.description: Grok Build is now available in Beta for all SuperGrok and X Premium+ users. Use Plan Mode, create images and videos with Imagine, and build automations or orchestrators with the CLI. Visitx.ai/clito get started.

item.title: @elonmusk: This trend will continue for many years
item.description: This trend will continue for many years

item.title: @elonmusk: We've expanded the Beta to many more people. Go tox.ai/clito give it a try. Our entire engineering t...
item.description: We've expanded the Beta to many more people. Go tox.ai/clito give it a try. Our entire engineering team will be responding to (and fixing) any issues you encounter, so please share feedback on X

item.title: @elonmusk: Chicago is basically just a warzone
item.description: Chicago is basically just a warzone

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build is still in beta for another month or so, but is already quite useful for production task...
item.description: Grok Build is still in beta for another month or so, but is already quite useful for production tasks

item.title: @elonmusk: My favorite prompt: a) make a plan for <task> b) orchestrate and launch sub-agents to execute the pl...
item.description: My favorite prompt: a) make a plan for <task> b) orchestrate and launch sub-agents to execute the plan c) validate the results from the sub-agents d) repeat b and c until you finish the plan

item.title: @elonmusk: Searching X in Grok Build is really fast and useful for research/docs/real-time info, video is not s...
item.description: Searching X in Grok Build is really fast and useful for research/docs/real-time info, video is not sped up

item.title: @elonmusk: The number of countries that held marches for… George Floyd: 93 Henry Nowak: 0 Very Telling.
item.description: The number of countries that held marches for… George Floyd: 93 Henry Nowak: 0 Very Telling.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok foundation model V9-Medium (1.5T) has finished training. Evals look good. A lot of Cursor data ...
item.description: Grok foundation model V9-Medium (1.5T) has finished training. Evals look good. A lot of Cursor data was added in supplementary training and there is more to come. Fine-tuning is underway and reinforcement learning begins in a few days. 2 to 3 weeks to public release. This will be a major improvement over the 0.5T v8-small that currently serves all Grok production traffic, especially for difficult coding tasks.
